title: SpaceTNTTracker
description: A precise, client-side TNT timer and tracker for Fabric. Features a fully interactive HUD editor, lag-independent accuracy, and dynamic audio alerts. Perfect for Anarchy and Factions players.
body:
[![Support me](https://i.imgur.com/g8Ob1Go.png)](https://ko-fi.com/klaidi4)

# 🧨 SpaceTNTTracker

**SpaceTNTTracker** is a modern, optimized client-side Fabric mod designed specifically for Anarchy and Factions players.

Tired of dying to unexpected TNT explosions or server lag? This mod adds a convenient on-screen TNT explosion timer that operates independently of server TPS and is fully customizable to suit your needs.

## ✨ Key Features

* 🖱️ **Interactive HUD Editor:** Open the editor with a single click. Drag the TNT widget anywhere on your screen and adjust its scale simply by using the mouse scroll wheel!
* ⏱️ **Accurate Timer (Anti-Lag):** The mod calculates the time until explosion using your PC's system clock. Even if the server hangs (TPS drops to 1), the timer remains perfectly accurate.
* 🔊 **Dynamic Audio Alerts:** The mod plays a sound that accelerates and increases in pitch as the explosion nears, helping you react in time.
* 🌟 **TNT Highlighting (Glow):** Optional ability to enable a glowing effect on primed TNT in the world, making it visible even in tall grass or behind obstacles.
* ⚙️ **Full Customization:** Adjust scan radius, sound volume, widget scale, and text size in-game via the intuitive Cloth Config menu.

## 🛠️ Installation & Dependencies

Two mandatory libraries are required for the mod to function:
1. [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
2. [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)

Simply drop the `SpaceTNTTracker.jar` and these libraries into your `mods` folder!

---
